title: Scorpion scorpion_exo_r1_air_vortex-tc-3

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with Polycarbonate Liner
specs.strap_type: Quick-Release Magnetic Buckle with YKK Hardware

technical_analysis: The scorpion_exo_r1_air_vortex-tc-3 utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber weave architecture that significantly reduces mass while maintaining structural rigidity against high-impact forces. The internal liner employs a multi-density EPS foam configuration, strategically zoned to absorb rotational energy and mitigate brain trauma risks during oblique impacts. Its aerodynamic shell geometry is engineered to manage airflow separation points, reducing drag coefficients by 15% compared to standard full-face designs.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of lightweight protection with the Scorpion Exo R1 Air Vortex TC-3, a helmet designed for riders who demand uncompromising performance without the weight penalty. Crafted from advanced carbon fiber composites, this full-face helmet delivers an exceptional strength-to-weight ratio, ensuring you stay agile on the track or open road while enjoying superior comfort during extended rides.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Scorpion Exo R1 Air Vortex TC-3: a lightweight carbon fiber full-face motorcycle helmet featuring ECE 22.06 certification, advanced ventilation, and optimized aerodynamics for high-speed performance.
yoast_focuskw: Scorpion Exo R1 Air Vortex TC-3
